Short Bio

Hello!👋 I am a 1st-year master student from University of Science and Technology of China advised by Fuli Feng & mentored by Wentao Shi. Previously, I worked as a research intern at MSR Asia, under the supervision of Furu Wei and the mentorship of Nan Yang, Liang Wang. My research interest mainly lies in:

  • LLM Reasoning & Reinforcement Learning
  • Agent & Agentic RL

I am always eager for discussions and collaborations! Feel free to email me!

Research Experience

  • 2024.09 - 2025.06, Research Intern at MSR Asia.

Education

  • M.E in Artificial Intelligence, 2025.09 - 2028.06(expected), University of Science and Technology of China, Hefei, Anhui, China
  • B.E in Computer Science, 2021.09 - 2025.06, University of Science and Technology of China, Hefei, Anhui, China

News

  • [Sep. 2025] Become a master student of LDS at USTC! 🥳
  • [Aug. 2025] One paper is accepted by EMNLP25'. See you in Suzhou, China! 🥰
  • [Sep. 2024] Become a research intern of General AI Group at MSR Asia! 🍾
